prompt: Say: I work in an office.
correctAnswer: Je travaille dans un bureau.
hints: Practise this phrase out loud.

prompt: Say: My shift starts at nine o'clock.
correctAnswer: Mon quart commence à 9 heures.
hints: Practise this phrase out loud.

prompt: Say: I am the new employee.
correctAnswer: Je suis le nouvel employé.
hints: Practise this phrase out loud.

prompt: Ask: Where is the meeting room?
correctAnswer: Où est la salle de réunion ?
hints: A useful first-day question.

prompt: Say: I need to print this document.
correctAnswer: Je dois imprimer ce document.
hints: Use 'I need to' for necessity.

prompt: Vocabulary: a person who works for a company
correctAnswer: salarié
hints: The opposite is 'employer'.

prompt: Say: My manager is very helpful.
correctAnswer: Mon manager est très utile.
hints: A manager is your direct boss.

prompt: Ask: What time does the office open?
correctAnswer: A quelle heure ouvre le bureau ?
hints: Use 'what time does' for asking about schedules.

prompt: Say: I work from home on Fridays.
correctAnswer: Je travaille de chez moi le vendredi.
hints: 'Work from home' means remote working.

prompt: Say: My colleague helps me a lot.
correctAnswer: Mon collègue m'aide beaucoup.
hints: A colleague is someone you work with.

prompt: Say: I start work at nine.
correctAnswer: Je commence à travailler à 9 h.
hints: Use present simple for routines.

prompt: Ask: Where is the training room?
correctAnswer: Où est la salle d'entraînement ?
hints: Use this on your first day.

prompt: Vocabulary: the final approval before release
correctAnswer: signature
hints: Hyphenated compound noun.

prompt: Say: I work with the sales team.
correctAnswer: Je travaille avec l'équipe de vente.
hints: Use 'work with' + team.

prompt: Say: I need a new password.
correctAnswer: Il me faut un nouveau mot de passe.
hints: Useful when contacting IT.

prompt: Vocabulary: someone you report to
correctAnswer: gestionnaire
hints: A core workplace noun.

prompt: Ask: Could you send me the report by Friday?
correctAnswer: Pourriez-vous m'envoyer le rapport d'ici vendredi ?
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I have a meeting at two o'clock this afternoon.
correctAnswer: J'ai une réunion à deux heures cet après-midi.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Ask: Can we reschedule the meeting to Thursday?
correctAnswer: On peut reporter la réunion à jeudi ?
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I will send you the updated version by end of day.
correctAnswer: Je vous envoie la version mise à jour d'ici la fin de la journée.
hints: 'By end of day' is a common work deadline phrase.

prompt: Ask: Could you copy me in on that email?
correctAnswer: Pouvez-vous me copier sur cet email ?
hints: 'Copy me in' means add you to the CC field.

prompt: Say: I would like to take two weeks of annual leave in August.
correctAnswer: Je voudrais prendre deux semaines de congé annuel en août.
hints: 'Annual leave' is the formal term for holiday days.

prompt: Ask: Who should I contact about IT issues?
correctAnswer: Qui dois-je contacter au sujet des questions de TI?
hints: Use 'who should I' to ask who is responsible.

prompt: Say: The deadline is next Monday at noon.
correctAnswer: La date limite est fixée au lundi prochain à midi.
hints: State the day and time clearly.

prompt: Choose the best response. A colleague asks if you can attend a meeting tomorrow.
correctAnswer: Je suis libre le matin, mais j'ai un appel l'après-midi.
hints: Give clear availability information.

prompt: Say: I have finished my tasks for today.
correctAnswer: J'ai terminé mes tâches pour aujourd'hui.
hints: Present perfect for completed actions.

prompt: Say: I have a meeting with the client this afternoon.
correctAnswer: J'ai une réunion avec le client cet après-midi.
hints: Use time markers for clarity.

prompt: Ask: Could you review this report before lunch?
correctAnswer: Pourriez-vous examiner ce rapport avant le déjeuner?
hints: Use 'Could you' for polite requests.

prompt: Say: I am responsible for weekly updates.
correctAnswer: Je suis responsable des mises à jour hebdomadaires.
hints: Use this to describe ownership.

prompt: Say: We finished the task ahead of schedule.
correctAnswer: Nous avons terminé la tâche en avance sur le calendrier.
hints: Good phrase for progress updates.

prompt: Say: I would like to discuss my progress at our next meeting.
correctAnswer: Je voudrais discuter de mes progrès à notre prochaine réunion.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: I was not able to attend the conference call due to a scheduling conflict.
correctAnswer: Je n'ai pas pu assister à la conférence téléphonique en raison d'un conflit de calendrier.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: I have been working on this project for three months.
correctAnswer: Je travaille sur ce projet depuis trois mois.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: I would appreciate some feedback on my presentation.
correctAnswer: J'aimerais avoir quelques commentaires sur ma présentation.
hints: 'I would appreciate' is polite and professional.

prompt: Ask: Could we arrange a brief call to discuss the next steps?
correctAnswer: Pouvons-nous faire un bref appel pour discuter des prochaines étapes?
hints: 'Brief call' means a short telephone or video meeting.

prompt: Say: I have identified a bottleneck in the current workflow.
correctAnswer: J'ai identifié un goulot d'étranglement dans le flux de travail actuel.
hints: 'Bottleneck' means a point that slows things down.

prompt: Say: My role involves coordinating between the sales and marketing teams.
correctAnswer: Mon rôle consiste à coordonner les équipes de vente et de marketing.
hints: 'My role involves' is a professional way to describe your job.

prompt: Ask: Could you give me an update on where things stand with the client?
correctAnswer: Pourriez-vous me donner une mise à jour sur la situation avec le client ?
hints: 'Where things stand' means the current situation.

prompt: Say: I would like to flag a potential risk before it becomes a problem.
correctAnswer: Je voudrais signaler un risque potentiel avant qu'il ne devienne un problème.
hints: 'Flag' in business means to highlight or draw attention to something.

prompt: Say: I have been given more responsibilities since my promotion.
correctAnswer: J'ai reçu plus de responsabilités depuis ma promotion.
hints: Passive present perfect; 'since my promotion' anchors the time.

prompt: Say: We should prioritize the customer issue before deployment.
correctAnswer: Nous devrions prioriser l'enjeu client avant le déploiement.
hints: Use 'should' for recommendations.

prompt: Say: I would like to propose a shorter meeting agenda.
correctAnswer: Je voudrais proposer un ordre du jour plus court.
hints: Polite formal suggestion structure.

prompt: Ask: Can we move this deadline to next Wednesday?
correctAnswer: Pouvons-nous reporter cette date à mercredi prochain ?
hints: Direct but collaborative phrasing.

prompt: Say: I need more context before I can approve this plan.
correctAnswer: J'ai besoin de plus de contexte avant d'approuver ce plan.
hints: State dependency clearly.

prompt: Say: I would like to propose a restructuring of the project timeline.
correctAnswer: Je voudrais proposer une restructuration du calendrier du projet.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: The stakeholders have concerns about the projected return on investment.
correctAnswer: Les intervenants sont préoccupés par le rendement prévu des investissements.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: Following up on my previous email, I wanted to clarify the deliverables.
correctAnswer: Suite à mon précédent courriel, je voulais clarifier les produits livrables.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: We need to align on priorities before committing resources to this initiative.
correctAnswer: Nous devons nous aligner sur les priorités avant d'affecter des ressources à cette initiative.
hints: 'Align on' means agree and coordinate on.

prompt: Say: The board is looking for a compelling narrative to accompany the financial projections.
correctAnswer: Le conseil d'administration cherche un récit convaincant pour accompagner les projections financières.
hints: 'Compelling narrative' means a persuasive story; 'projections' are forecasts.

prompt: Ask: Have you factored in the opportunity cost of delaying the launch?
correctAnswer: Avez-vous pris en compte le coût d'opportunité de retarder le lancement?
hints: 'Factor in' means take into account; 'opportunity cost' is what you give up.

prompt: Say: I recommend we pilot the solution with a small cohort before scaling.
correctAnswer: Je recommande de piloter la solution avec une petite cohorte avant l'échelle.
hints: 'Pilot' as a verb means to test; 'scaling' means expanding.

prompt: Say: The cross-functional collaboration on this project has been exceptional.
correctAnswer: La collaboration interfonctionnelle sur ce projet a été exceptionnelle.
hints: 'Cross-functional' means involving different departments.

prompt: Ask: What metrics are we using to evaluate the success of this campaign?
correctAnswer: Quelles mesures utilisons-nous pour évaluer le succès de cette campagne?
hints: 'Metrics' are measurable indicators of performance.

prompt: Say: The procurement process needs to be streamlined to reduce lead times.
correctAnswer: Le processus d'approvisionnement doit être rationalisé pour réduire les délais.
hints: 'Streamlined' means made more efficient; 'lead times' are delays before delivery.

prompt: Say: We need to align deliverables with stakeholder expectations.
correctAnswer: Nous devons aligner les produits livrables sur les attentes des intervenants.
hints: Use precise business vocabulary.

prompt: Say: I suggest we document risks before final sign-off.
correctAnswer: Je suggère de documenter les risques avant l'approbation finale.
hints: Strong phrasing for process quality.

prompt: Ask: How should we mitigate potential delays in this rollout?
correctAnswer: Comment devrions-nous atténuer les retards potentiels dans ce déploiement?
hints: Use 'mitigate' for formal risk language.

prompt: Say: This proposal balances short-term impact with long-term sustainability.
correctAnswer: Cette proposition équilibre l'impact à court terme avec la durabilité à long terme.
hints: Contrast clauses raise sophistication.
